title: DA1 5PP, Finning (UK) Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/WP3838UH/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Finning (UK) Limited   Installation name: Long Reach Combined Heat and Power Plant   Permit number: EPR/WP3838UH/V004   "
